chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-325 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.2022/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 6. 3. For orders on Misc. No.2023/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2026. Mr. Muhammad Irfan Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. This Petition is not maintainable inasmuch as the Petitioner seeks enforcement of the Order of the Banking Mohtasib, whereas this Court is not the executing forum for such purpose. Since the remedy lies before the Banking Mohtasib, the Petitioner may avail the same accordingly. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
